arts.ttl: Breaking: After tension and rigmarole, Alphonso Davies and Bayern Munich nearing agreement
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are close to an agreement with Alphonso Davies over a new contract. Bayern are close to completing the agreement to extend Alphonso Davies’ contract, talks advancing.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies to renew Bayern Munich contract - First domino to fall?
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies is set to commit his future to Bayern Munich. Transfermarkt can confirm an initial report by The Athletic that the Canadian men’s national team star is set to sign a new...

arts.ttl: Report: Jamal Musiala will extend his contract at Bayern Munich and get elusive release clause
arts.sum: Negotiations between Bayern and Musiala have advanced, but the deal is not done yet, as there is no agreement on the salary yet. According to a report from Sky Sport journalists Florian Plettenberg and Kerry Hau, Jamal Musiala will get the hefty contract he desires — and also the elusive release clause, too.

arts.ttl: Report: Christopher Nkunku’s move to Bayern Munich depends on Mathys Tel, may wait for summer
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku joining Bayern in January is currently unlikely due to Chelsea’s €70m asking price and the fact Mathys Tel wants to stay at Bayern, even though Nkunku’s agent Pini Zahavi wants to make the deal happen. Should a January move prove to be impossible, Nkunku remains an option for Bayern in the summer [@Plettigoal]

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich fend off Real Madrid to secure Alphonso Davies’ future
arts.sum: According to David Ornstein, Alphonso Davies is close to agreeing on a contract extension with Bayern Munich. For over twelve months, there has been great uncertainty regarding the future of…

arts.ttl: Davies reportedly close to agreeing new Bayern deal
arts.sum: Bayern appear to have reached a breakthrough in their contract talks with Alphonso Davies.
Germany's preeminent footballing publication reports that VfL Wolfsburg managing director Peter Christiansen has eyes for another Danish international.

arts.ttl: “I love playing for this club” says Eric Dier with Bayern contract expiring in 2025
arts.sum: Eric Dier made his third start for Bayern Munich this season in the Bundesliga. Regardless of the game time, Dier delivered back to back solid performances, first against Borussia Mönchengladbach and then against TSG Hoffenheim.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Wolfsburg: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: A look at the rosters and injuries for Wolfsburg and Bayern Munich . Bayern Munich maintain their lead at the top of the Bundesliga after a 5-0 thumping of Hoffenheim, but last season’s title winners Bayer Leverkusen is right on their heels.

arts.ttl: Andreas Skov Olsen: Who is Wolfsburg's new Danish international winger?
arts.sum: Skov Olsen scored three goals for Bologna in Serie A. Skov Olsen has converted his skill more readily into goals and assists thus far in his career, and gained greater playing time for the Danish national team.
